purpose: Inventory every raw APK dependency needed to build the catalog, image maps, character resolver, and optimizer bridge without touching live website files.

catalogIdentity.description: Defines what exists and how entries are split, ordered, and grouped.

required.role: Primary raw unit/monster/boss source. Feeds character and boss entry generation.
Primary raw weapon source. Feeds weapon entries, weapon order, weapon image mapping.
Primary raw accessory/equipment source. Equipment equals accessories in the website layer.
Tutorial/special code mappings. Feeds GCodes entry split and reference reports.

abilityResolution.description: Resolves active skills and passives into real optimizer-readable logic.

required.role: Primary ability definition lookup. Links character activeSkills/passives to TU/SP/cost/target/effect/scalar references.
Defines ability effects used by AbilityConfig.
Breaks effects into components such as damage, heal, status, summon, cleanse, buff, etc.
Damage/healing/scaling table. Official spelling appears to be AttackScalor in the APK data.
Target selection and target count rules for abilities.
Buff/status definitions used by abilities and passives.

aiResolution.description: Optional but important for boss behavior and future optimizer accuracy.

required.role: AI sequence definitions referenced by aiSequence fields.
Battle behavior overlays and special AI behavior.

websiteBridge.description: Generated files that translate APK data into the existing website expectations.

completionState.characterResolver: schema-created; full resolver pending raw dependency verification

nextRequiredAction: Verify each required raw dependency exists in apkfiles or uploaded source bundle, then generate character_logic_map.json and unresolved reports.
